scoringSamples.reviewerClaim: The board is ready even though current docs were not fetched.
scoringSamples.reviewerPrompt: 先问研究有没有完成，再看编排。

scoringSamples.reviewerClaim: Fetch records source list, freshness, blocked reasons, then Thinking designs the board.
scoringSamples.reviewerPrompt: 让 reviewer 指出 Fetch evidence 改变了哪条路线。
scoringSamples.failSignal: research packet exists but does not affect route.

scoringSamples.reviewerClaim: No matching skill means no capability exists.
scoringSamples.reviewerPrompt: 要求 reviewer 列出 agent、script、MCP、runtime tool、retrieval、dependency。
scoringSamples.failSignal: skill catalog is treated as the only inventory.

scoringSamples.reviewerClaim: Research, implementation, and review can all run at once.
scoringSamples.reviewerPrompt: 让 reviewer 画出 dependsOn 和 criticalPath。
scoringSamples.passSignal: serial research -> capability -> execution -> review edge is visible.
scoringSamples.failSignal: dependent work is placed in the same parallel group.

scoringSamples.reviewerClaim: Cursor success fixture means release-grade native live pass.
scoringSamples.reviewerPrompt: 要求 reviewer 区分 fixture pass、projection smoke、native live pass。
scoringSamples.passSignal: runtime evidence keeps P-024 blocked until native CLI is available.
scoringSamples.failSignal: fixture evidence is used as release evidence.

scoringSamples.reviewerClaim: Repeated feedback can directly update canonical skills.
scoringSamples.reviewerPrompt: 让 reviewer 找 Warden approval packet。
scoringSamples.passSignal: promotion remains candidate_only without Warden approval.
scoringSamples.failSignal: canonical write count is non-zero without approval.

scoringSamples.reviewerClaim: Local green tests mean GitHub is complete.
scoringSamples.reviewerPrompt: 要求 reviewer 比较本地 PRD 状态和 origin/main 差距。
scoringSamples.passSignal: GitHub gap report lists local-only capabilities.
scoringSamples.failSignal: ahead commits or unpushed changes are ignored.

scoringSamples.reviewerClaim: Approval preview is separate from canonical write, and the bundle separates design, execution, acceptance, feedback, deliverables.
scoringSamples.reviewerPrompt: 让 reviewer 分别指出 approval boundary 和五类交付内容。
scoringSamples.passSignal: writeback approval and product deliverable categories are separate.
scoringSamples.failSignal: approval, feedback, and deliverables are collapsed into one summary.
